ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Renewal_Quote_Link__c)), OR( ISNEW(), ISCHANGED(Renewal_Quote_Link__c) ), OR( TEXT(Renewal_Quote_Link__r.zqu__QuoteBusinessType__c) != "Renewal (with/without upsell)", CASE(TEXT(Renewal_Quote_Link__r.zqu_Quote_Status__c), "Approved By Billing", 0, "New Amendment", 0, "Pending Legal Or Billing request", 0, "Pending Rep To Adjust Quote", 0, "Terms Approved", 0, 1 ) = 1 ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Invalid Renewal Quote: to link a Quote, it must have a Business Type of 'Renewal (with/without upsell)' and one of the following Statuses: Approved By Billing, New Amendment, Pending Legal/Billing, Pending Rep To Adjust, or Terms Approved.
